nodes.title: Getting Started
widgets_values:
# Your First Image

A simple **text-to-image** workflow for local users and modest GPUs. Work through each section left to right, then click **Queue** to generate.

This starter uses **DreamShaper 8** — a **fine-tuned** checkpoint built on the original **Stable Diffusion 1.5** base (2022). It keeps SD 1.5's speed and low VRAM needs while improving overall image quality. Newer base models (Z-Image, Flux, Qwen Image, etc.) look better but need more hardware.

**Steps:**
1. Load Model
2. Prompt
3. Image Size
4. Sampling
5. Save

Tip: use **512×512** — the native resolution SD 1.5 was trained on.

nodes.title: Note: Load Model
widgets_values:
**Load Checkpoint** selects your model file (.safetensors). It outputs the **model**, **CLIP** (reads your prompt), and **VAE** (decodes the final image).

**DreamShaper_8_pruned** is a **fine-tuned** version of the original **SD 1.5** base model — not the raw checkpoint itself. It was trained further on curated images to improve quality and versatility. The `_pruned` suffix means extra weights were trimmed to keep the file smaller and faster to load on modest GPUs.

Put checkpoint files in `ComfyUI/models/checkpoints/`. When switching models, check its docs — each fine-tune or base model may need different resolutions, samplers, and prompt styles.

nodes.title: Note: Prompt
widgets_values:
Describe what you want in the **positive** prompt (green). List things to avoid in the **negative** prompt (blue).

**SD 1.5 prompt style:** This generation of models works best with **comma-separated tags** rather than full sentences — e.g. `masterpiece, best quality, 1girl, blonde hair, cinematic lighting`. Quality boosters and a detailed **negative** list (as shown here) are typical for SD 1.5 era models.

Newer models often prefer natural-language sentences. When you switch checkpoints, check how that model expects prompts to be written.

Start by editing the example text and re-running to see how changes affect the result.

nodes.title: Note: Image Size
widgets_values:
**Empty Latent Image** sets width, height, and batch size.

**Why 512×512?** SD 1.5 was trained at **512px** — DreamShaper 8 inherits this. Staying near 512 gives the best results. Very large sizes (e.g. 1536+) often look worse, use more VRAM, and run much slower.

**Other models, other sizes:** SDXL uses ~1024, Flux uses different sizes again. Always check the model card before changing width/height.

Start at **512×512**. Only go larger after 512 runs smoothly, and only if your model supports it.

nodes.title: Note: Sampling
widgets_values:
**KSampler** generates the image.

- **Steps** (20) — more detail, but slower
- **CFG** (8) — how strongly the prompt is followed
- **Seed** — randomize for variety; fix to repeat a result
- **Sampler** — euler is fast and fine for starters

Want more detail? Select the **KSampler** node and click **Node Info** in the toolbar — ComfyUI includes built-in docs explaining each parameter.

nodes.title: Note: Save
widgets_values:
**VAE Decode** turns the internal latent into a visible image.

**Save Image** writes the result to `ComfyUI/output/`. Preview appears on the node after queuing.

nodes.title: FAQ
widgets_values:
**Can I use this template for any model?**

No. This workflow is designed for **SD 1.5** checkpoints like DreamShaper. Other model types — SDXL, Flux, Qwen Image, video models, etc. — need different nodes, loaders, resolutions, and prompt styles. Simply swapping in a different model here usually won't work.

**What should I do instead?**

Open the **template library** and find a workflow that matches your model type. Those templates come with the correct pre-built pipeline already wired up. Start from the matching template, then customize — swap models, edit prompts, and adjust settings on a working foundation.

nodes.title: Note: Model Link
widgets_values:
## Model Links (for Local Users)

**checkpoints**

- [DreamShaper_8_pruned.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Lykon/DreamShaper/resolve/main/DreamShaper_8_pruned.safetensors)


## Model Storage Location

```
📂 ComfyUI/
├── 📂 models/
│   └── 📂 checkpoints/
│       └── DreamShaper_8_pruned.safetensors
```
